question: What is this product?
answer: Our product is an AI-powered smart assistant designed to help you automate daily tasks, answer questions, and boost your productivity.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: To create an account, click the 'Sign Up' button on our homepage, enter your email address and a strong password, then verify your email. Your account will be ready in minutes!

question: Is there a free trial available?
answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start your trial.

question: How much does the product cost?
answer: We offer three pricing plans: Basic ($9/month), Pro ($29/month), and Enterprise (custom pricing). All plans include our core features with different usage limits.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, UPI, and bank transfers for Enterprise plans.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your registered email address, and we'll send you a password reset link within 2 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
answer: Absolutely! You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. You'll continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.

question: Is my data secure?
answer: Yes, we take security very seriously. All data is encrypted using AES-256 encryption, stored on ISO 27001 certified servers, and we are fully GDPR compliant. We never sell your data to third parties.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach our support team via live chat (available 24/7), email at support@product.com, or call us at +1-800-123-4567 during business hours (9am–6pm IST).

question: Does the product work on mobile?
answer: Yes! Our product is fully responsive and works on all devices. We also have dedicated iOS and Android apps available on the App Store and Google Play.

question: What programming languages are supported?
answer: Our API supports Python, JavaScript, Java, Ruby, PHP, Go, and C#. We provide SDKs and detailed documentation for each language.

question: How do I integrate the API?
answer: After creating an account, go to the Developer section, generate your API key, and follow our quickstart guide. Full API documentation is available at docs.product.com.

question: What is the uptime guarantee?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime backed by our SLA. Our infrastructure runs on redundant cloud servers across multiple regions to ensure maximum availability.

question: Can I export my data?
answer: Yes, you can export all your data at any time in CSV, JSON, or PDF format from your account settings under 'Data & Privacy'.

question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied within 30 days of purchase, contact our support team for a full refund, no questions asked.

question: How many users can I add to my account?
answer: The Basic plan supports 1 user, Pro supports up to 10 users, and Enterprise supports unlimited users with role-based access control.

question: Is there a limit on API calls?
answer: Basic plan: 1,000 API calls/month. Pro plan: 50,000 API calls/month. Enterprise plan: Unlimited API calls with priority rate limits.

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Log in to your account, go to Settings > Billing > Upgrade Plan. The upgrade is instant and you'll be charged the prorated difference for the current billing cycle.

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: We support all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera. We recommend keeping your browser updated to the latest version for the best experience.

question: Is there an offline mode?
answer: Our mobile apps support limited offline functionality. Core features like viewing saved content and drafts are available offline, while AI-powered features require an internet connection.
